nasb.text: Peter went down to the men and said, “Behold, I am the one you are looking for; what is the reason for which you have come?”

esv.text: And Peter went down to the men and said, “I am the one you are looking for. What is the reason for your coming?”

cnv.text: 於是彼得下樓到他們那裡，說：“看，我就是你們所要找的人。你們是為甚麼來的？”

ccb.text: 彼得就下去见他们，说：“我就是你们要找的人，有什么事？”

csbs.text: 彼得就下到那些人那里，说：“看，我就是你们要找的人。你们来到这里是为了什么缘故呢？”
